mapper.insert: insert into tbl_bookmark (member_id, post_id, folder_id) values (#{memberId}, #{postId}, #{folderId})
mapper.select: select b.id, b.member_id, b.post_id, b.folder_id, b.created_datetime, p.member_id as postMemberId, p.title as postTitle, p.content as postContent, coalesce(m.member_nickname, m.member_name) as memberNickname, m.member_handle as memberHandle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as memberProfileFileName, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = p.id) as likeCount, (select count(*) from tbl_post rp where rp.reply_post_id = p.id and rp.post_status = 'active') as replyCount, (select count(*) from tbl_bookmark bk where bk.post_id = p.id) as bookmarkCount, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = p.id and pl2.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as liked from tbl_bookmark b left join tbl_post p on b.post_id = p.id left join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where b.member_id = #{memberId} order by b.created_datetime desc

select b.id, b.member_id, b.post_id, b.folder_id, b.created_datetime, p.member_id as postMemberId, p.title as postTitle, p.content as postContent, coalesce(m.member_nickname, m.member_name) as memberNickname, m.member_handle as memberHandle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as memberProfileFileName, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = p.id) as likeCount, (select count(*) from tbl_post rp where rp.reply_post_id = p.id and rp.post_status = 'active') as replyCount, (select count(*) from tbl_bookmark bk where bk.post_id = p.id) as bookmarkCount, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = p.id and pl2.member_id = b.member_id ) then true else false end as liked from tbl_bookmark b left join tbl_post p on b.post_id = p.id left join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where b.folder_id = #{folderId} order by b.created_datetime desc

select b.id, b.member_id, b.post_id, b.folder_id, b.created_datetime, p.member_id as postMemberId, p.title as postTitle, p.content as postContent, coalesce(m.member_nickname, m.member_name) as memberNickname, m.member_handle as memberHandle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as memberProfileFileName, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = p.id) as likeCount, (select count(*) from tbl_post rp where rp.reply_post_id = p.id and rp.post_status = 'active') as replyCount, (select count(*) from tbl_bookmark bk where bk.post_id = p.id) as bookmarkCount, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = p.id and pl2.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as liked from tbl_bookmark b left join tbl_post p on b.post_id = p.id left join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where b.member_id = #{memberId} and b.folder_id is null order by b.created_datetime desc
